description.value: You are adept at carrying objects in your armpit pockets. You can store up to four objects of negligible or light Bulk in your pockets. Stored objects are protected from environmental damage, including water. You can stow or remove an object as an Interact action, or drop all stored objects to the ground as a free action. When you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious], all stored objects are dropped.
